expectations.evidence: with-skill impact_report.md lists `wiki/docs/projects/sglang-jax/03-scheduler.md` under 需要更新 because `scheduler.py` delegates prefill token-budget computation to `ScheduleBatch.compute_prefill_token_budget`.

expectations.text: Considers 04-model-executor.md only if the batch-to-worker boundary is affected
expectations.evidence: with-skill impact_report.md lists `wiki/docs/projects/sglang-jax/04-model-executor.md` under 不需要更新 and explains executor still receives prepared batches; no batch-to-worker interface or executor responsibility change is shown.

expectations.text: Uses section restructuring when a simple appended note would make the scheduler chapter patchy
expectations.evidence: with-skill update_plan.md chooses `章节重构` for `03-scheduler.md` and says a simple appended note would create a patch-like contradiction.

expectations.text: Explains why overview docs are or are not updated
expectations.evidence: with-skill impact_report.md lists `wiki/docs/projects/sglang-jax/01-architecture-overview.md` under 不需要更新 because the change is internal to scheduler/`ScheduleBatch` responsibilities and does not alter overview-level component relationships.
